basic_details.job_title: ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior
basic_details.short_information: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior (ABV-IIITM Gwalior) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in engineering/technology or equivalent with 60% marks, GATE/NET preferred
qualification.details: Master's degree in engineering/technology/electronics/mechatronics or equivalent (MSc/MCA/MS in relevant field) with minimum 60% marks or CGPA 6.5. GATE/NET preferred. Desirable: Image Processing, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, PyTorch, Python.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ABV-IIITM Gwalior to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at ABV-IIITM Gwalior?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow position is 06 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in engineering/technology/electronics/mechatronics or equivalent (MSc/MCA/MS in a relevant field) with a minimum of 60% marks or CGPA 6.5. GATE/NET qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the ABV-IIITM Gwalior Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at ABV-IIITM Gwalior.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior (ABV-IIITM Gwalior).

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include expertise in Image Processing, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, PyTorch, and Python.

faq.question: Q10. Where is ABV-IIITM Gwalior located?
faq.answer: ABV-IIITM Gwalior is located in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 474015.
